texts.Assign one or more stock categories by h: Assign one or more stock categories by holding Ctrl/Cmd.
texts.Stock keeping unit - a unique alphanumer: Stock keeping unit - a unique alphanumeric code that retailers assign to each product and its variations to internally track inventory.
texts.Global trade item number - a unique, glo: Global trade item number - a unique, globally recognized product identifier that helps track trade items (products or services) throughout the supply chain.
texts.Manufacturer part number - a unique alph: Manufacturer part number - a unique alphanumeric code assigned by a product manufacturer to identify a specific product or part.
Product weight in kgs or lbs.
texts.Low stock threshold to trigger a notific: Low stock threshold to trigger a notification.
The unique title and slug of a product.
texts.Used when a product is previewed or shar: Used when a product is previewed or shared on social media platforms.
texts.Used by an AI assistant to find relevant: Used by an AI assistant to find relevant products.
texts.Provide one product ID per line, ex: 736: Provide one product ID per line, ex: 73650c25e8452e7519db0f02042ef283646328bc.
texts.Override default prices by clicking on t: Override default prices by clicking on the button above.
texts.Square footage formula to calculate pric: Square footage formula to calculate price.
texts.Final price = Material cost + Additional: Final price = Material cost + Additional margin.
Provide one product ID per line.

texts.The token will be shown only once after: The token will be shown only once after creation. Make sure to copy it to a secure location.
texts.A descriptive name to identify this toke: A descriptive name to identify this token (e.g., "Mobile App", "Integration Service").
texts.Read Only - Can only view data: Read Only - Can only view data
texts.Read & Write - Can view and modify data: Read & Write - Can view and modify data
texts.Choose the appropriate permission level: Choose the appropriate permission level based on your needs. Read Only is recommended for most integrations.
